name: Wrong Train
description:
Oh shit (?)

In a hurry, accidentally got onto a train full(if you consider four people full) of gootraxians, not a human in sight... And they don't seem to want to leave you be.

Decided to make something else rather than the series My first bot with more than a single character, probably won't be the best

I was about to say here that my bots are turning out bad while all this time I was using 0.4 TEMP... I tried 0.8 and now I can't go back. Tried out this bot before unlocking and it works surprisingly well with this temp. Carneline might be a little out of character, but idk, leave your opinions.

Also didn't know what to put as first message so now you have a friend who's wedding you gotta be at.

Turns out the bot might misgender the characters... No idea why.
creator: GameCrusher777
